notes: Observed queue times above 8 minutes on weekday morning peaks for the last two weeks.
description: Customers regularly waiting more than 5 minutes in queue during peak periods

notes: Morning team is opening without a daily huddle and issues are being discovered live on the floor.
description: No daily team briefing or shift handover communication

notes: Peak staffing pattern is not calibrated: two baristas are idle mid-afternoon but the morning queue still collapses.
description: Staffing levels not aligned to actual peak-hour demand patterns

notes: Revenue per trading hour has fallen over the last three weekly comparisons despite peak queues remaining unresolved.
description: Revenue per trading hour declining by more than 5 percent over consecutive periods

notes: Payroll is running above target while the shift shape still fails to cover peak demand cleanly.
description: Payroll costs exceeding 35 percent of revenue
